name: Slack / Mattermost — outbound notifications
description: Outbound (action) connector: posts a XORCISM alert / incident / message to a Slack or Mattermost channel via an incoming webhook (both share the same payload format). Use it to push SOC alerts, exposure findings or chain results to your team channel — the SOAR/ChatOps complement to the inbound SOC-tool connectors. Config (worker environment variables): SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL or MATTERMOST_WEBHOOK_URL (or pass `webhook`). Severity colours the message; with no webhook (or dry_run) it returns the built payload without sending. Does NOT read or write the database.

parameters.name: text
parameters.help: Message body (Markdown). Required unless title is given.

parameters.name: severity
parameters.help: critical | high | medium | low | info — colours the message

parameters.name: link
parameters.help: Optional URL (e.g. deep-link to the alert in XORCISM)

parameters.name: channel
parameters.help: Optional channel override (Slack/Mattermost webhooks that allow it)

parameters.name: username
parameters.help: Display name for the bot message

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.help: Build the payload but do not send it (returns the payload)
